hero.title: Discover Filipino Market
hero.subtitle: Fresh produce, pantry staples, and local goods - from Filipino communities, straight to your door.

home.whyDesc: A marketplace built for Filipino communities
home.whyAuthenticDesc: Produce harvested yesterday, at your door today. Direct from local farms and vendors across the Philippines.
home.whyDirectDesc: No middlemen. You support the local vendor directly. Every purchase sustains local livelihoods.
home.whyImpactDesc: We coordinate shipping across the Philippines so you can enjoy local goods anywhere in the islands.
home.newsletterDesc: Get stories, new arrivals, and vendor spotlights delivered to your inbox.

footer.aboutDesc: Palengkee is a multi-vendor marketplace that connects Filipino communities with fresh produce, local essentials, and everyday goods.
footer.copyright: © {year} Palengkee. Made with care in the Philippines.
footer.disclaimer: A demo built with care for Filipino makers. No real transactions.

listings.title: Browse

product.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience.
